headline: Allstate (ALL) Down 4.6% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
summary: Allstate (ALL) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Is Allstate (ALL) the Most Undervalued Stock to Invest In?
summary: The Allstate Corporation (NYSE:ALL) is one of the 12 Most Undervalued Stocks to Invest In. On May 21, 2026, The Allstate Corporation (NYSE:ALL) announced estimated catastrophe losses for April of $870M, or $687M after tax. headline: Progressive Now No. 1 U.S. Private Auto Insurer For Full 12 Months, Estimates Show
summary: There is a new US private auto market share leader on a 12-month basis for the first time since World War II, S&P Global Market Intelligence estimates. Read more here.
